request.text:
P-III guidelines. Multiple alternatives are available for those who either are statin intolerant or who fail to achieve therapeutic goals. While these statements are relatively simple, it took decades for them to become standard medical practice. Considerable work is ongoing to identify what factors are most important to residual risk. This work plus ongoing effectiveness research in clinical practice networks should lead to significant changes in how practitioners approach dyslipidemia over the next 1 – 2 decades.

This is a PDF file of an unedited manuscript that has been accepted for publication. As a service to our customers we are providing this early version of the manuscript. The manuscript will undergo copyediting, typesetting, and review of the resulting proof before it is published in its final citable form. Please note that during the production process errors may be discovered which could affect the content, and all legal disclaimers that apply to the journal pertain.
